examples.title: Basic Insertion at Beginning
examples.description: Insert a new node at the start of the list

languages.python:
def insert_at_beginning(self, data):
    new_node = Node(data)
    new_node.next = self.head
    self.head = new_node

# Usage:
# ll = LinkedList()
# ll.insert_at_beginning(10)
# ll.insert_at_beginning(20)
# Result: 20 -> 10 -> None
